Title: locutus is vulnerable to Prototype Pollution
Description: A Prototype Pollution vulnerability exists in the the npm package locutus (>2.0.12). Despite a previous fix that attempted to mitigate Prototype Pollution by checking whether user input contained a forbidden key, it is still possible to pollute Object.prototype via a crafted input using String.prototype. This issue was fixed in version 2.0.39.
NotImpacted: All versions before 2.0.12, all versions starting from 2.0.39
